items.docs: Sends a transactional email to one or more recipients. Supports personalization with dynamic parameters, template-based content, attachments, and scheduled delivery. Can also send to multiple recipients in a single call.

Sends multiple transactional emails in a single API call. Each email in the batch can have different recipients, content, and parameters. Template placeholders can fetch values from the contact database.

info.name: Get the content of a sent transactional email

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique message identifier of the sent transactional email.

items.docs: Retrieves the personalized content of a previously sent transactional email including the rendered HTML body, subject line, and recipient information.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the event query in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the event query in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: event
params.description: Filter by event type such as delivered, opened, clicked, hardBounce, softBounce, blocked, spam, or unsubscribed.

params.name: email
params.description: Filter events by recipient email address.

params.name: messageId
params.description: Filter events by the unique message identifier.

params.name: templateId
params.description: Filter events by the template ID used for sending.

items.docs: Retrieves all transactional email activity as unaggregated events. Returns individual event records for deliveries, opens, clicks, bounces, spam reports, and other email activity.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

items.docs: Retrieves aggregated statistics for transactional email activity over a specified period. Returns totals for requests, delivered, opens, clicks, bounces, and other metrics.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: templateStatus
params.description: Filter templates by their active status.

items.docs: Retrieves all transactional email templates created in the account. Templates can be used to send personalized transactional emails with consistent formatting.
Creates a new transactional email template with HTML content, subject line, and sender information. Templates support dynamic parameters for personalization.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The unique identifier of the email template.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific transactional email template by its unique identifier.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The unique identifier of the email template.

items.docs: Updates an existing transactional email template with new content, subject line, or sender information.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The unique identifier of the email template.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a transactional email template by its unique identifier.

params.name: ip
params.description: Filter senders by dedicated IP address.

items.docs: Retrieves the list of all sender identities configured in the account for use with transactional and marketing emails.
Creates a new sender identity that can be used for sending transactional and marketing emails. The sender must be verified before use.
